mnemonics.title: MapReduce Phases - MSR
mnemonics.content: M - Map (transform input to key-value pairs), S - Shuffle and Sort (group by key, transfer to reducers), R - Reduce (aggregate to final output). Think: 'MSR processes data'.

mnemonics.title: Data Locality Levels - NRO
mnemonics.content: N - Node-local (best: same node, no network), R - Rack-local (good: same rack, minimal network), O - Off-rack (acceptable: different rack, full network). Think: 'NRO - Near to Remote Order'.

mnemonics.title: Combiner Rule - ACE
mnemonics.content: A - Associative operations only, C - Commutative operations only, E - Examples: sum, count, max, min (NOT average directly). Think: 'ACE your Combiner selection'.

mnemonics.title: MapReduce Fault Tolerance - RSIS
mnemonics.content: R - Retry failed tasks (4 attempts), S - Speculative execution (duplicate slow tasks), I - Input replication (HDFS 3 copies), S - State recovery (recompute from input). Think: 'RSIS Recovers Safely In Seconds'.
